data.title: Soul App Releases International Women's Day Report: Gen Z Women Unplugging to Thrive
data.description: On March 6, 2026, in Shanghai, a significant annual event called International Women's Day was celebrated to honor and recognize women globally. Soul App, a prominent AI-driven immersive social platform based in China, collaborated with its research division Just So Soul Institute to release the Soul App Report.

data.title: Science Minister Highlights Innovation Cultivation for Next 5 Yrs
data.description: In Beijing on March 6, 2026, a report stated that there will be a focus on strengthening original and groundbreaking scientific research during the 15th Five-Year Plan period (2026-2030). The aim is to enhance the systematic implementation of basic research initiatives. This indicates a significant commitment to advancing scientific innovation and development in the coming years.

data.title: Ragnarok Zero: Global - Pre-Registration Opens March 5 for the First Global Ragnarok PC Server
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on March 6, 2026, GRAVITY GAME UNITE SDN. BHD. revealed that Pre-Registration for Ragnarok Zero: Global began on March 5, 2026. This launch marks the initiation of the first Global PC service for the Ragnarok series, offering an expansive gaming experience to fans worldwide.

data.title: India is reverting to Russian oil due to conflict, despite a trade deal to stop imports. Middle East issues disrupted supply chains.
data.description: India had struck a trade deal with President Trump to cease its imports of oil from Russia. However, due to ongoing conflict in the Middle East, the country has been unable to secure alternative supplies. This has resulted in India continuing to import oil from Russia despite the initial agreement. The specifics of the deal and the quantities involved are unknown at this time.

data.title: Lyn Alden predicts Bitcoin will outperform gold in the next 2-3 years due to an unfairly negative perception of Bitcoin.
data.description: According to macroeconomist Lyn Alden, there is a sense of euphoria surrounding gold in the market. In contrast, Bitcoin is facing somewhat unfair negative sentiment. Alden's assessment highlights contrasting attitudes towards the two assets, with gold experiencing positive sentiment and Bitcoin being viewed unfairly in a negative light.

data.title: Due to conflict in the Gulf, India reverts to Russian oil as alternative sources are blocked.
data.description: India had procured oil from Russia under a trade deal with President Trump, aiming to end such imports. However, due to a new conflict, alternative oil supplies from the Middle East were interrupted. This development impacted India significantly in terms of oil imports and trade agreements.

data.title: Analyst Lyn Alden predicts Bitcoin will outperform gold in the next 2-3 years due to negative sentiment towards gold.
data.description: Economist Lyn Alden believes that there is a sense of euphoria surrounding gold, contrasted with an unfairly pessimistic view towards Bitcoin. Alden's observations highlight a disparity in the public sentiment towards the two assets.
